languages.text: "Заодно угроза взрыва поможет загнать непокорную живую десятину на баржи. Некоторые рекруты не в себе, но бомбы быстро приведут их в чувство".

traits.locale_text: "Заодно угроза взрыва поможет загнать непокорную живую десятину на баржи. Некоторые рекруты не в себе, но бомбы быстро приведут их в чувство".

languages.text: "The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."
languages.original_text: "Похоже, угроза взрыва должна и загнать непокорную живую десятину на баржи. Некоторые рекруты не в себе, но бомбы быстро приведут их в порядок".

traits.locale_text: "It seems that the explosive threat should also drive the unruly living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits are unsettled, but the bombs will set them straight in no time."
"It seems that the explosive threat should also drive the unruly living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits are unsettled, but the bombs will set them straight in no time."
"It seems that the threat of explosion should also drive the unruly living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits are unsettled, but the bombs will set them straight in no time."
"It seems that the threat of explosion should also drive the unruly living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits are unsettled, but the bombs will set them straight in no time."

"The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."

"The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."

languages.text: «La amenaza de una posible detonación también debería ayudar a transportar al diezmo viviente a las naves, por indisciplinado que sea. Algunos reclutas no se mostrarán muy cooperativos ahora, pero eso cambiará en cuanto sepan lo de las bombas».
languages.original_text: "The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."

traits.locale_text: «La amenaza de una posible detonación también debería ayudar a transportar al diezmo viviente a las naves, por indisciplinado que sea. Algunos reclutas no se mostrarán muy cooperativos ahora, pero eso cambiará en cuanto sepan lo de las bombas».

languages.text: “炸弹就埋在所有人脚下，这应该可以把那些不守纪律的卫队士兵赶到船上。有些新兵可能一开始不太合作，但只要告诉他们炸弹的事情，他们马上就能安分下来。”
languages.original_text: "The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."

traits.locale_text: “炸弹就埋在所有人脚下，这应该可以把那些不守纪律的卫队士兵赶到船上。有些新兵可能一开始不太合作，但只要告诉他们炸弹的事情，他们马上就能安分下来。”

languages.text: 「爆発の可能性による脅威は、統制されていない生きている租税を荷船の上に集めるのにも役立っている。新兵の一部は決して協力的ではないが、爆弾について彼らに教えれば考えを正すだろう」
languages.original_text: "The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."

traits.locale_text: 「爆発の可能性による脅威は、統制されていない生きている租税を荷船の上に集めるのにも役立っている。新兵の一部は決して協力的ではないが、爆弾について彼らに教えれば考えを正すだろう」

languages.text: « La menace d'une éventuelle explosion devrait également contribuer à convaincre les membres les plus rétifs de la dîme vivante de monter à bord des barges. Si certaines recrues refusent pour l'heure de coopérer, la découverte de l'existence de ces bombes suffira à les faire rentrer dans le rang. »
languages.original_text: "The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."

traits.locale_text: « La menace d'une éventuelle explosion devrait également contribuer à convaincre les membres les plus rétifs de la dîme vivante de monter à bord des barges. Si certaines recrues refusent pour l'heure de coopérer, la découverte de l'existence de ces bombes suffira à les faire rentrer dans le rang. »

languages.text: "Olası bir patlatma tehdidi, disiplinsiz canlı aşarı mavnalara sürmeye de yardımcı olacaktır. Acemilerin bir kısmı şu an iş birliğine pek yanaşmıyor olabilir ama bombalardan söz ettiğimizde hizaya geleceklerdir."
languages.original_text: "The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."

traits.locale_text: "Olası bir patlatma tehdidi, disiplinsiz canlı aşarı mavnalara sürmeye de yardımcı olacaktır. Acemilerin bir kısmı şu an iş birliğine pek yanaşmıyor olabilir ama bombalardan söz ettiğimizde hizaya geleceklerdir."

languages.text: "Die Gefahr einer möglichen Detonation dürfte auch helfen, den undisziplinierten lebenden Zehnt auf die Lastschiffe zu treiben. Einige der Rekruten werden wohl nicht sonderlich kooperativ sein, aber das Wissen um die Bomben wird sie auf Kurs bringen."
languages.original_text: "The threat of a possible detonation should also help to herd the undisciplined living tithe onto the barges. Some of the recruits may be less than cooperative now, but telling them about the bombs will set them straight."

traits.locale_text: "Die Gefahr einer möglichen Detonation dürfte auch helfen, den undisziplinierten lebenden Zehnt auf die Lastschiffe zu treiben. Einige der Rekruten werden wohl nicht sonderlich kooperativ sein, aber das Wissen um die Bomben wird sie auf Kurs bringen."
